meta.title: America's Allies in the New Administration: Saudi Arabia and the Gulf States
meta.description: Michael Doran, Lee Smith, Mohammed Alyahya, and Ali Shihabi discuss Iran, Saudi Arabia, and the new direction of the Trump administration.
